title: Senior Financial Analyst - South Indian Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - South Indian Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with South Indian Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About South Indian Bank:
South Indian Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank!
